journey.name: Lock_Screen_test
journey.description: used to check weather the app dedection system is working properly and correct logs are registerd in the Activity logs page which is used to triggger the lock screen

actions.action: go back to DALE , suring the accessibility services is enabled for DALE
after sucessfuly creating the group , go and try to open the app (any app which is selected for the grop ) and enetering the pin
with interval of 10 seconds close the app and reopen it and ensure the app lock is activated when left and comming back.
after opening the app in and out for 5 times with interval of 10 seconds . go and check the activity logs in DALE><group_name>>app logs>activity logs
